description: The Krypteia was an Agoge rite of passage in which selected Spartan youths learned stealth, endurance, and survival while policing the helot population. Each year the ephors declared ritual war upon the helots, allowing members of the Krypteia to kill suspected rebels without religious penalty.
tooltip: The Krypteia produce deadlier Spartan elites at the expense of the helot population. Champion infantry deal 10% more melee damage but require 10% longer to train. Heroes deal 20% more melee damage. Helots have 25% less Health and require 10% longer to train.
